name: manim-production
description: Production guidance for generating high-quality Manim teaching animations.

interface.shortDescription: Workflow and quality rules for Manim animation generation.
interface.longDescription: Provides a Manim-focused skill with scene planning, narration, math visualization, and anti-pattern guidance for educational animation tasks.
defaultPrompt: Create a clear Manim teaching animation for this math concept.
Review this Manim scene for pacing, layout, and narration quality.
Refactor this Manim script to follow educational animation standards.
